seo.title: Automotive Solutions
seo.description: Driving in ASEAN means more than just reducing heat. Every journey exposes you, your family and your vehicle to intense solar heat, harmful UV, HEV Blue Light and long-term interior damage.

data.subhead: Driving in ASEAN means more than just reducing heat. Every journey exposes you, your family and your vehicle to intense solar heat, harmful UV, HEV Blue Light and long-term interior damage.

media.alt: Sedan driving under intense tropical sun, cabin views with and without IrisPro film

cards.title: Extreme Cabin Heat
cards.description: Parked vehicles can become extremely hot under tropical sunlight.

cards.title: Harmful UV & HEV Blue Light
cards.description: Daily exposure affects your skin and eyes.

cards.title: Interior Fading
cards.description: Leather, dashboard, plastic and electronics fade and age faster.

cards.title: High Air-conditioning Usage
cards.description: Higher cooling demand means more fuel or battery consumption.

cards.title: EV Battery Consumption
cards.description: Air-conditioning uses battery energy that could otherwise be used for driving.

cards.title: Family Comfort
cards.description: Children and elderly passengers are more sensitive to heat and UV exposure.

data.hint: Click on the icon above to find the best IrisPro solution for your needs.

recommendation.title: Maximise infrared heat rejection
recommendation.body: Films with multi-layer sputtering reflect the most solar heat. Start with the Plus Series (IRR up to 95% at 1400nm) or step up to Signature for maximum rejection.

options.label: I Want Better Skin & Eye Protection

recommendation.title: UV+420™ complete protection
recommendation.body: Every IrisPro series blocks UV400 and HEV Blue Light (380–420nm) at the source — the difference for skin and eyes is the UV+420™ optical layer, standard across the range.

recommendation.title: Less air-conditioning, more range
recommendation.body: Heat rejection lowers cooling demand, which preserves battery for driving. EV owners typically choose the Plus Series for enhanced cooling with signal-friendly construction.

options.label: I Want To Protect My Car Interior

recommendation.title: Stop fading before it starts
recommendation.body: Blocking UV and infrared heat slows leather, trim and electronics ageing. Anti-fade constructions are available across Plus and Signature.

recommendation.title: Signature Series
recommendation.body: Multi-layer silver sputter construction with IRR up to 98% (1400nm) — IrisPro's maximum performance tier, with a 10-year performance warranty.

options.label: I Want The Best Overall Value

recommendation.title: Comfort Series
recommendation.body: Great comfort, great value: UV+420™ protection and IRR up to 90% with a 5-year performance warranty — the right fit for daily driving and families.

pillars.title: UV+420™ Optical Technology
pillars.description: Blocks UV400 & HEV Blue Light (380–420nm) for complete protection.

pillars.title: 6-Layer Hotmelt™ Technology
pillars.description: Patented 6-layer structure for long-lasting durability and optimal performance.

pillars.title: Multi-layer Sputtering
pillars.description: Reflects up to 98% of solar heat (1400nm) for superior heat rejection.

pillars.title: Professional Installation
pillars.description: Strict installation standards for maximum performance & warranty support.

_unplaced.note: Copy from the canonical screen with no expressible section field. Preserved for the client / a future section type.
_unplaced.why-does-this-happen: Solar energy from the sun contains UV, HEV Blue Light and Infrared Heat. Without advanced protection, your vehicle continues absorbing solar energy throughout the day.

thermal-comparison.without: WITHOUT IRISPRO — Surface Temp up to 68°C
thermal-comparison.with: WITH IRISPRO — Surface Temp up to 38°C

_unplaced.proof-footnote-scope: The on-screen footnote also carries the asterisk on 'Energy Saving Up to 30%*'; the schema renders one footnote per stat, so it is attached to the 10°C stat only to avoid a duplicated line.

_alternates.note: Second automotive screen ('Complete Protection for Every Drive'). NOT rendered — see _conflicts.md §15. Client must rule which variant is canonical.

hero.subhead: IrisPro automotive window films are engineered for ASEAN climate to deliver superior comfort, protection and performance.

challenges.heading: The Real Challenges of Driving in ASEAN

cards.title: Extreme Heat
cards.description: Cabin temperature can reach up to 70°C when parked under the sun.

cards.title: Harmful UV & Blue Light
cards.description: UV rays and HEV Blue Light penetrate glass and harm your skin and eyes.

cards.title: Interior Fading & Damage
cards.description: Dashboard, leather, and electronics fade, crack and deteriorate over time.

cards.title: High Fuel / Energy Usage
cards.description: More heat means your A/C works harder, consuming more fuel or battery.

cards.title: Family & Health Risk
cards.description: Long-term exposure to UV increases risk of skin damage and _verify

our-solution.heading: IrisPro Window Films Solve the Problem
our-solution.body: With advanced UV+420™ technology, 6-layer hotmelt structure and multi-layer sputtering, IrisPro films deliver total protection so you can drive cooler, safer and more comfortably.
bullets: Block UV400, UVA1 (380–400nm) & HEV Blue Light (380–420nm)
Reject up to 98% of total solar energy
Keep car interior cooler and more comfortable
Protect your skin, eyes and overall health
Extend the life of your car interior
Lower A/C load and save fuel / EV energy
